videos.video_subject: Why letting Cristiano Ronaldo leave was Real Madrid's biggest mistake - he scored 450 goals in 438 games and won four Champions Leagues in five years, and is still their all time top scorer
videos.video_script: In twenty eighteen, Real Madrid let this man leave. Four fifty goals in four thirty eight games. Four Champions Leagues in five years. Seven years on, still nobody has come close. So you have to wonder,
